backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for RawFit Gym backend defining data types (members, diets, workouts, packages, attendance, videos) and state maps; includes membership management, attendance tracking, pause requests, and mixes in authorization and blob storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the promotion of draft Version 49 to production with relevant frontend release files, component dependencies, and test ID REQ-1.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing 1–2 sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file with Tailwind directives and OKLCH-based design token variables for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that sets the page title to 'RawFit Gym - Think Fit, Be Fit' and mounts the React app via src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with five routes, QueryClient, and ThemeProvider; MemberDashboardGuard reads localStorage directly for immediate auth checks, while AdminDashboardGuard uses Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays an access-denied card with a logout button that clears Internet Identity and React Query cache when the user lacks permissions.
frontend/src/components/admin/Attendance: Admin tab for managing member attendance, supporting manual check-in/check-out, attendance history lookup, and displaying a gym QR code generator.
frontend/src/components/admin/DashboardT: Admin dashboard overview tab displaying stat cards for total members, diet charts, workout charts, and packages, along with pause request notifications and quick-action hints.
frontend/src/components/admin/DietFormDi: Dialog form for creating or editing a diet chart, including dynamic meal entry fields with nutritional details, backed by create/update mutations.
frontend/src/components/admin/DietsTab.t: Admin tab that lists all diet charts with search filtering and allows creating or editing charts via the `DietFormDialog`.
frontend/src/components/admin/GymQRCodeG: Card component that generates and displays a timestamped gym QR code for member attendance scanning, with auto-refresh every 30 minutes and a download option.
frontend/src/components/admin/MemberForm: A dialog form component for creating and editing gym member profiles, supporting fields like name, contact, membership package, diet/workout chart assignments, date ranges, status, and discount (flat or percentage) with live price preview.
frontend/src/components/admin/MembersTab: Admin tab that lists all gym members in a searchable card grid, showing membership status badges and package info, with buttons to add new members or edit existing ones via MemberFormDialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/PackageFor: A dialog form for creating or updating membership packages, capturing package type, duration in months, and price in INR with a live formatted price preview.
frontend/src/components/admin/PackagesTa: Admin tab that displays all membership packages in a searchable card grid with edit and delete actions, using PackageFormDialog for create/edit and an AlertDialog for delete confirmation.
frontend/src/components/admin/PauseReque: Admin component that shows pending membership pause requests as a notification card, allowing admins to approve or deny each request via confirmation dialogs with optional admin messages.
Admin tab component for reviewing and managing member membership pause requests, displaying pending and processed requests in tables with approve/deny dialogs that support optional admin messages.
frontend/src/components/admin/VideoLibra: Admin tab for browsing and searching the workout video library, displaying videos in a grid with metadata and a button to open the video upload dialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/VideoUploa: Dialog form for uploading a new workout video with title, category, description, and file fields, tracking upload progress via ExternalBlob and submitting via the addVideo mutation.
frontend/src/components/admin/WorkoutFor: Dialog form for creating or editing a workout chart, allowing admins to set name, description, and a dynamic list of exercises with sets, reps, and instructions.
frontend/src/components/admin/WorkoutsTa: Admin tab that lists all workout charts in a searchable grid and opens WorkoutFormDialog for creating new charts or editing existing ones.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React class-based error boundary that catches render errors and shows an alert with the error message and a reset/reload button.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky admin header showing the RawFit Gym logo, name, and tagline alongside a user avatar dropdown with profile info and logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberDas: Renders the member dashboard tab showing membership status, QR attendance card, and membership details, with support for pause/resume membership actions.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberHea: Sticky header component for the member portal displaying the gym logo, member avatar, and a dropdown menu with logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberMem: Card component that displays a member's current membership status (active, paused, or expired) along with pause request status alerts and admin messages.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberVid: Tab component that shows workout videos assigned to a member's plan, gating access behind a geolocation check to ensure the member is within the gym's radius.
frontend/src/components/member/QRAttenda: Card component that handles QR-code-based gym attendance by verifying the member's location and scanning a gym QR code before recording check-in via a mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProductionVersio: Alert component that compares the reported app version against the expected production version and displays a warning with cache-clearing instructions when there is a mismatch.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name and email to complete their profile, submitting via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, initializing admin access control and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useMemberAuth.ts: Custom hook for gym member authentication using a membership ID, persisting login state to localStorage and syncing it across browser tabs via storage and custom events.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data (members, diet/workout charts, attendance, videos, packages, pause requests) using the canister actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, sidebar, charts).
frontend/src/lib/currencyUtils.ts: Utility functions for formatting numeric values as Indian Rupees (INR) using the Intl API, including per-month and coercion helpers for legacy or mixed-currency data.
frontend/src/lib/locationUtils.ts: Utility functions for geolocation: calculates distance between coordinates via the Haversine formula and verifies whether the user is within an authorized radius of the gym.
frontend/src/lib/memberAuthLogger.ts: Singleton structured logger for member authentication flows, providing masked member ID logging for events like login attempts, validation responses, localStorage operations, and cross-tab sync.
frontend/src/lib/qrCodeUtils.ts: Utility functions for generating, parsing, and validating QR code data for gym attendance, including checksum generation/verification and timestamp validation.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabbed navigation covering Dashboard, Members, Diets, Workouts, Packages, Attendance, Videos, and Pause Requests sections.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Admin login page using Internet Identity authentication, with loading, error, and retry states, plus branding and a login card UI.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Empty login page file with no content.
frontend/src/pages/LoginSelectionPage.ts: Landing page presenting two login options—Member and Admin—with navigation cards routing to their respective login pages.
frontend/src/pages/MemberDashboard.tsx: Member dashboard page that fetches member data by membership ID and renders a tabbed layout with Dashboard and Video Library tabs.
frontend/src/pages/MemberLoginPage.tsx: Member login page with a membership ID input form, validation, error display, and navigation to the member dashboard on success.
frontend/src/release/expectedProductionV: Defines the expected production version string (v1.4.9.0) and provides utilities to compare and display version match status with normalization logic.
Defines the smoke test checklist items for Version 49 across health, admin, and member categories, along with helper functions to calculate category and overall completion progress.
frontend/src/release/SmokeTestOverlay.ts: A React dialog component that displays a production smoke test checklist for Version 45, auto-checking health items based on backend health data and tracking overall/category progress.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and hash cleanup helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state schema and existing features for the RawFit Gym app, recording that Version 49 has been promoted to production.
